title: Caribou Overhears the Secret
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is caribou overhears the secret.
scene: The scene focuses on caribou overhears the secret, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then Aokiji isn't a Marine any more...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Have granted the Marines frightful New Power...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The guy who crushed my hometown!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Truly, he is a despicable man...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you even listening to me?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're so tasty!! The meat's great too!!

summary: Caribou Overhears the Secret. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
